title: Pasta starch and sauce adhesion · Italian application 1
summary: Starch released into cooking water helps emulsify fat and water.
idea: Science is most useful when it helps you observe, adjust and recover during cooking.
steps: Change only one variable.
Observe aroma, texture, colour and moisture.
Record the point at which the result improves or declines.
detail: Treat temperatures and timings as guides; thickness, equipment and ingredient condition change the outcome.
challenge: Run a small side-by-side test for pasta starch and sauce adhesion.
